title: Customer Panel Modifications: Remove History, Disable Auto-Scroll, Simplify Ticket Payment

requirements.text: Remove the chat/ticket history section (ServiceHistoryTimeline and any related 'History' tab) from the CustomerDashboard and ClientPortal entirely. The tab and its contents should not appear in the customer-facing UI.

quotes: Remove History Option: Delete the chat/ticket history section from the customer dashboard entirely.

acceptanceCriteria: No 'History' or 'Service History' tab is visible in the CustomerDashboard or ClientPortal.
ServiceHistoryTimeline component is not rendered anywhere in the customer-facing flow.
Removing the tab does not break any other functionality.

requirements.text: Disable any automatic scroll-to-top behavior on both the CustomerDashboard and ExpertDashboard panels. When switching tabs or navigating within these dashboards, the page/panel should remain at its current scroll position.

quotes: Disable Auto-Scroll: Stop automatic scrolling to top on both customer and expert panels.

acceptanceCriteria: Switching tabs in CustomerDashboard does not scroll the page/panel to the top.
Switching tabs in ExpertDashboard does not scroll the page/panel to the top.
No window.scrollTo, element.scrollTop, or similar auto-scroll calls are triggered on tab changes in either dashboard.

requirements.text: Remove the full payment requirement that blocks ticket creation in TicketCreationForm. Replace it with a minimum fixed charge of $1 USD. The ticket creation flow should proceed after a $1 charge is processed, not the full session payment. Eliminate any logic that enforces the full payment script before ticket submission.

quotes: Remove full payment requirement for ticket creation (currently blocking customers).
Implement minimum $1 fixed charge only—eliminate the full payment script.

acceptanceCriteria: Customers can create a ticket after a $1 fixed charge without being blocked by a full payment requirement.
TicketCreationForm no longer presents or enforces a full payment flow before ticket submission.
The $1 minimum charge is clearly communicated to the customer in the ticket creation UI.
Backend ticket creation logic does not require full payment validation to proceed.
Chat remains disabled for customers (no change to that behavior).

constraints: Chat must remain disabled for customers — do not change this behavior.
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Expert dashboard history timeline (ServiceHistoryTimeline in ExpertDashboard) should remain untouched — only remove from the customer side.
nonGoals: Changing any expert/technician panel payment request functionality.
Modifying the knowledge base or analytics sections.
Removing payment functionality from the expert-initiated PaymentRequestModal.
